description:
Recto: The end of a legal document dated Sunday, 2 of Tevet 5323 AM = 28 November 1562 CE. Concerning the obligations of a certain Daniel. Written and signed by Eliyya b. David Ḥavriyya. 

Verso: The end of a different legal document signed Menaḥem ha-Kohen.
description_he: סוף מסמך משפטי מתוארך ב-2 בטבת ה'שכ"ג = 28 בנובמבר 1562.
